name: DPDK Host
description: Ubuntu 22.04 with DPDK 23.11 built from source and hugepages configured. Needs ConnectX-5/6 SmartNIC component.

commands.command: sudo apt-get install -y build-essential meson ninja-build python3-pyelftools libnuma-dev pkg-config

cd /opt && sudo wget https://fast.dpdk.org/rel/dpdk-23.11.tar.xz && sudo tar xf dpdk-23.11.tar.xz && cd dpdk-23.11 && sudo meson setup build && cd build && sudo ninja && sudo ninja install && sudo ldconfig
sudo bash -c 'echo 1024 > /sys/kernel/mm/hugepages/hugepages-2048kB/nr_hugepages' && sudo mkdir -p /mnt/huge && sudo mount -t hugetlbfs nodev /mnt/huge
